headline: Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV): A Decent Value Play for Savvy Investors
summary: Aptiv PLC (APTV) offers classic value: a P/E of 7.30, moderate growth, and solid fundamentals. Discover why this undervalued auto tech stock provides a margin of safety for investors.
